title: Malformed Large Session Store
objective: A deliberately malformed large session-store wrapper, used to detect expensive startup parsing, repair, and rejection behavior without confusing it with valid user session state.

prepare.title: Prepare Host Import Fixture
prepare.intent: Create a host-side malformed import fixture under the run artifact directory so state import behavior is exercised without touching durable user envs.
evidence: host malformed import fixture exists under the Kova artifact directory

setup.title: Import Malformed Large Session Store
setup.intent: Import malformed large session and memory files into common OpenClaw state locations.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- sh -lc 'mkdir -p "$OPENCLAW_HOME/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions" "$OPENCLAW_HOME/.openclaw/memory" "$OPENCLAW_HOME/sessions" "$OPENCLAW_HOME/memory"; cp "{artifactDir}/import/session-pack/sessions.json" "$OPENCLAW_HOME/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/sessions.json"; cp "{artifactDir}/import/session-pack/sessions.json" "$OPENCLAW_HOME/sessions/sessions.json"; cp "{artifactDir}/import/session-pack/memory.json" "$OPENCLAW_HOME/.openclaw/memory/memory.json"; cp "{artifactDir}/import/session-pack/memory.json" "$OPENCLAW_HOME/memory/memory.json"'

cleanup.title: Cleanup Host Import Fixture
cleanup.intent: Remove host-side import fixture files after the env is no longer being retained.

setupEvidence: host malformed import fixture exists under the Kova artifact directory
